---
title: "The Sandpile Model"
fontsize: 95%
---

* Part 1([site](part1.qmd) or [colab notebook](https://colab.research.google.com/github/rmdal/sandpile/blob/master/docs/sandpile_part1.ipynb))
* Part 2([site](part2.qmd) or [colab notebook](https://colab.research.google.com/github/rmdal/sandpile/blob/master/docs/sandpile_part2.ipynb))
